docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARDESON, JASON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETSWORTH, ANDREW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SARDESON, JASON PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR PAYMENT OF ANY DAMAGES IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY BETSWORTH, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT SARDESON, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY BETSWORTH, ANDREW SARDESON, JASON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
